name: France Business Climate (all sectors)
notes: INSEE BDM idbank 001565530 — INSEE is the ultimate source; supersedes the FRED republication on the shared FRA_BUS_CONF column. Verified live 2026-06.

name: France ILO Unemployment Rate (excl. Mayotte, SA)
notes: INSEE BDM idbank 001688527 — national ILO/BIT unemployment rate. Shares FRA_UNEMPLOYMENT with OECD; OECD's monthly cadence usually wins on freshness, with INSEE as the primary-source fallback. Verified live 2026-06 (8.1%, Q1-2026).

name: France GDP, chained volume (SA-WDA, base 2020)
notes: INSEE BDM idbank 011794860 — quarterly national accounts GDP volume level (cf. FRA_GDP_GROWTH which is the IMF growth rate). Verified live 2026-06.
